_comment: Per-project sidecoach taste-gate exceptions. Each entry suppresses one named absolute-ban finding from the BLOCKING gate (sidecoach-taste-gate.sh). The raw detector (scanForAbsoluteBans) still reports the pattern - this only tells the enforcement layer the pattern is a deliberate, accepted design call, not an oversight. Match is by ban name + file basename; line numbers are ignored because they drift. Keep a reason on every entry so the acceptance is on the record.

accept.reason: Jonah's explicit design call (2026-06-15): the 3-up stat card band ('By the numbers') is the chosen treatment. The ledger alternative that cleared the ban was rejected on taste. This grid is accepted, not an oversight - do not auto-flag it as a failure.
